rulings.Case Title: ZFC CONCEPTS, LLC DBA SLOANE, A CALIFORNIA VS. 1042 MINNA HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 1, 2017 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANTs PETER CONLEY and LISA PERKIN's MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. The motion is GRANTED as to the terms and allegations relating to "Building Foundation," these allegations are stricken as any claims regarding this encroachment are barred by the statute of limitations. The motion denied as to the terms and allegations pertaining to "Wooden Formwork and/or Polystyrene" and Attorney's Fees as delayed discovery and claim for fees based on tort of another are sufficiently stated. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZFC CONCEPTS, LLC DBA SLOANE, A CALIFORNIA VS. 1042 MINNA HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 1, 2017 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANTs PETER CONLEY and LISA PERKIN DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT OVERRULED. Third Amended Cross-Complaint alleged facts that support the assertion that the Formwork encroachment, upon which the causes of action are based, is subject to the delayed discovery rule; therefore, the causes of action are sufficiently pled within the 3-year statute of limitations. = (501/REQ)
